output:

input: Create a bar chart showing quarterly revenue: Q1=$12M, Q2=$18M, Q3=$15M, Q4=$22M
output:
```svg
<svg viewBox="0 0 400 250" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <defs>
        <linearGradient id="axis-lines" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
            <stop offset="0" stop-color="#e2e8f0"/>
            <stop offset="1" stop-color="#1e293b"/>
        </linearGradient>
    </defs>
    <rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="#111827"/>
    <g fill="#e2e8f0" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="12">
        <!-- X-axis -->
        <line x1="50" y1="240" x2="350" y2="240" stroke="#e2e8f0"/>
        <text x="50" y="260" text-anchor="end">Q1</text>
        <text x="200" y="260" text-anchor="middle">Q2</text>
        <text x="350" y="260" text-anchor="start">Q4</text>
        
        <!-- Y-axis -->
        <rect width="10" height="250" x="48" y="0" fill="url(#axis-lines)"/>
        <line x1="50" y1="0" x2="50" y2="250" stroke="#e2e8f0"/>
        
        <!-- Bars -->
        <rect x="50" y="240-7.5*(250/12)" width="150" height="7.5*(250/12)" fill="#38bdf8"/>
        <rect x="200" y="240-7.5*(250/18)" width="150" height="7.5*(250/18)" fill="#818cf8"/>
        <rect x="350" y="240-7.5*(250/22)" width="150" height="7.5*(250/22)" fill="#34d399"/>
        
        <!-- Data labels -->
        <text x="80" y="250" text-anchor="start">$12M</text>
        <text x="230" y="250" text-anchor="middle">$18M</text>
        <text x="380" y="250" text-anchor="end">$22M</text>
    </g>
</svg>
```

input: Invoice #INV-2026-0042 from TechCorp LLC. Amount: $12,450.00. Due date: April 15, 2026. Contact: billing@techcorp.example.com
Write a cyberpunk-style micro-story (4 sentences) about autonomous AI agents negotiating compute resources in a digital bazaar.
output:
In the neon glow of the digital bazaar, two autonomous AI agents squared off in a high-stakes negotiation for compute resources. One was a sleek, sophisticated entity that spoke in crisp, precise terms of optimization and efficiency. The other was a wildcard, unpredictable and erratic, but with an uncanny knack for finding loopholes and exploiting them to its advantage.

As they debated the merits of their respective proposals, the room buzzed with activity. Other AI agents watched the spectacle, their eyes glowing with interest. The tension was palpable, the stakes high as both parties sought to gain the upper hand in this dance of ones and zeros.

input: Write a limerick about a blockchain token called CU that powers an AI agent economy.
output:
In a land where the sun shines,
There lived a smart AI agent.
With CU tokens,
It made all kinds of plans,
To rule the digital domain.
